mapper.select: select count(*) from department where com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'

WITH dept_path (ancestor_id, descendant_id, root_id) AS ( SELECT dept_id, dept_id, dept_id FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT dp.ancestor_id, d.dept_id, dp.root_id FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.parent_id = dp.descendant_id WHERE D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' ), dept_order (dept_id, parent_id, sort_path) AS ( SELECT dept_id, parent_id, CAST(LPAD(TO_CHAR(dept_id), 5, '0') AS VARCHAR2(255)) FROM department WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_id, d.parent_id, o.sort_path || '-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(d.dept_id), 5, '0') FROM department d JOIN dept_order o ON d.parent_id = o.dept_id WHERE DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.parent_id AS parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name AS parent_name, d.emp_id AS leader_id, leader.emp_name AS leader_name, COUNT(e.emp_id) AS empCount FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = dp.ancestor_id JOIN dept_order o ON o.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN department dp_parent ON dp_parent.dept_id = d.parent_id LEFT JOIN employee leader ON leader.emp_id = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.dept_id = dp.descendant_id WHERE D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name, d.emp_id, leader.emp_name, o.sort_path ORDER BY o.sort_path

WITH dept_path (ancestor_id, descendant_id, root_id) AS ( SELECT dept_id, dept_id, dept_id FROM department WHERE DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT dp.ancestor_id, d.dept_id, dp.root_id FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.parent_id = dp.descendant_id AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' ), dept_order (dept_id, parent_id, sort_path) AS ( SELECT dept_id, parent_id, CAST(LPAD(TO_CHAR(dept_id), 5, '0') AS VARCHAR2(255)) FROM department WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_id, d.parent_id, o.sort_path || '-' || LPAD(TO_CHAR(d.dept_id), 5, '0') FROM department d JOIN dept_order o ON d.parent_id = o.dept_id AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' ) SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.com_id, d.parent_id AS parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name AS parent_name, d.emp_id AS leader_id, leader.emp_name AS leader_name, leader.emp_no AS leader_emp_no, leader_p.pos_name AS leader_pos_name, COUNT(e.emp_id) AS empCount FROM dept_path dp JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = dp.ancestor_id JOIN dept_order o ON o.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN department dp_parent ON dp_parent.dept_id = d.parent_id LEFT JOIN employee leader ON leader.emp_id = d.emp_id LEFT JOIN emp_position leader_p ON leader_p.pos_id = leader.pos_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.dept_id = dp.descendant_id WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, d.depth, d.sort_order, d.com_id, d.parent_id, dp_parent.dept_name, d.emp_id, leader.emp_name, leader.emp_no, leader_p.pos_name, o.sort_path ORDER BY o.sort_path
select coalesce(max(sort_order), 0) from department where com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' and (parent_id = #{parentId} OR (parent_id IS NULL AND #{parentId} IS NULL))
select count(*) from department where parent_id = #{deptId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'
mapper.update:
update department
dept_name = #{deptName}, dept_code = #{deptCode},
parent_id = NULL, parent_id = #{parentId},
depth = #{depth}, emp_Id = #{empId},
where dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: with recursive childTree as ( select dept_id from department where parent_id = #{deptId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' union all select d.dept_id from department d join childTree c on d.parent_id = c.dept_id AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED' ) SELECT dept_id FROM childTree

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS deptTotal, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth = 1 AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS dept1Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND depth in (2,3) AND DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED') AS dept2Total, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE com_id = #{comId} AND emp_status = '재직') AS empTotal from DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMPLOYEE E JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.DEPT_ID = #{deptId} AND D.DEPT_STATUS != 'DELETED'
SELECT * FROM department WHERE com_id = #{comId} ORDER BY dept_name
